settings.text:
There's a new name to know in women's golf apparel, and she's making waves. Meet Victoria Paulsen, the latest addition to the TRENDYGOLF lineup and a brand that's reshaping what it means to dress for the game.

Founded in 2022 by London-based fashion professional and passionate golfer Victoria Paulsen, this women's-only label brings a fresh perspective to the fairway: confident, curated, and unapologetically stylish. What started as a side hustle quickly evolved into a standout collection of pieces that blend high-fashion sensibility with on-course performance, and it's all designed by a woman golfer, for women golfers.

Designed With Purpose

Like many great ideas, Victoria Paulsen was born out of a gap in the market. Frustrated by the lack of fashionable, affordable options for women on the course, especially younger players, Victoria decided to create her own solution. She taught herself design programs, sourced her own production, and launched her first capsule collection in 2023, all while working full-time and living abroad. The result? Sleek, functional silhouettes that transition effortlessly from tee time to post-round plans.

Style Meets Substance

At its core, Victoria Paulsen is about more than just good looks. It's about empowerment, accessibility, and shaking up an industry that's long overdue for a refresh. The brand's mission is simple: create women's golf apparel that feels as good as it looks, and fits seamlessly into your everyday life.

Whether you're new to the game or a seasoned player, these collections are designed to help you feel confident, capable, and effortlessly chic—on the green or off.

Now on TRENDYGOLF

We're proud to welcome Victoria Paulsen to the TRENDYGOLF family. Explore the latest drops now and discover a new era in women's golf fashion - one that puts style, fit, and function at the forefront.

Because your golf game deserves a wardrobe to match.
